seoTitle: How to Set Up Coupon Codes in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to create and apply coupon codes in GoHighLevel for your products, funnels, or checkout pages to run discounts and promotions in 2026.
intro: Running a promotion or discount through your GoHighLevel store or funnel starts with setting up a coupon code correctly. This guide covers creating a coupon, defining its discount and rules, and applying it to your checkout.

steps.heading: Open the coupon settings
steps.body: Navigate to the payments or e-commerce section of GoHighLevel where coupon codes are managed.

steps.heading: Create a new coupon
steps.body: Set up a new coupon with a unique code that customers will enter at checkout to apply the discount.

steps.heading: Define the discount type and amount
steps.body: Choose whether the coupon offers a percentage off or a fixed dollar discount, and set the value accordingly.

steps.heading: Set usage rules and limits
steps.body: Configure details like expiration date, usage limits, or which products the coupon applies to, so it behaves exactly how you intend.

steps.heading: Apply the coupon to your checkout or funnel
steps.body: Link the coupon to the relevant product, funnel, or checkout page, then test it to confirm the discount applies correctly.

faq.question: Can I limit a coupon to specific products?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel lets you restrict a coupon to particular products or funnels rather than applying it site-wide.

faq.question: Can I set an expiration date on a coupon?
faq.answer: Yes, you can configure a coupon to expire on a specific date or after a set number of uses.

faq.question: Why isn't my coupon code working at checkout?
faq.answer: Check that the coupon is active, hasn't expired, and is actually linked to the product or funnel where you're trying to apply it.

faq.question: Can I track how many times a coupon has been used?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel provides usage data for coupons so you can see how often a code has been redeemed.
